examples: Elastic edging on the top and bottom anchors the bandeau in place.
Soft signature lace bandeau boasts a wide bottom band of stretch lace for light support.
The black rectangular jagged sequin bandeau maxi dress epitomises festive party-wear mixed with Kate's signature rock-n-roll style.
In fairness, Ms. Teigen had to saw the log in a tight black Herve Leger bandeau dress that accentuated her curves and a pair of 6-inch Prada heels.
